name: Covalent
description: Retrieve token balances on one blockchain and discover activity for an address across supported chains with the Covalent GoldRush API.

auth.hint: Create a GoldRush API key and send it as the bearer token. GoldRush keys begin with cqt_ or ckey_.

tools.name: get_token_balances
tools.description: Get native and fungible-token balances, spot prices, and metadata for an address on one chain.

params.name: chainName
params.description: Supported chain name or chain ID, for example eth-mainnet.

params.name: walletAddress
params.description: Wallet address or supported ENS, RNS, Lens Handle, or Unstoppable Domain.

params.name: quote-currency
params.description: Fiat quote currency such as USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, or another documented supported value.

params.name: no-spam
params.description: Remove suspected spam tokens when true.

tools.name: get_address_activity
tools.description: Find the supported chains on which a wallet address has activity.

params.name: walletAddress
params.description: Wallet address or a supported resolvable domain.

params.name: testnets
params.description: Include testnet activity when true; defaults to false.
